installCommand: set -e; echo '--- [1/2] root install (for style-dictionary + tsx) ---'; cd .. && npm install && echo '--- [2/2] reference install (for next.js) ---'; cd reference && npm install
buildCommand: set -e; echo '--- [1/2] root build:tokens ---'; cd .. && npm run build:tokens && echo '--- [2/2] reference build (runs prebuild hook, then next build) ---'; cd reference && npm run build
